name: Baked Grapefruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each grapefruit in half crosswise. Remove any pits and cut around each section with a sharp knife.
2. Sprinkle each grapefruit half with 1 teaspoon of sugar.
3. Dot each half with 1/2 teaspoon of butter. Place the grapefruit halves on a paper plate.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes.
5. Garnish each half with a maraschino cherry.
6. Serve hot.
